hero.title: Import Cars from China

items.description: No hidden fees. You know the full cost before making a deposit.

items.title: Delivery Guarantee
items.description: We deliver your car in 25-45 days. Every vehicle is insured during transit.

items.description: Direct work with Chinese dealers and auctions. Every car passes inspection.

items.title: Legal Purity

items.title: Financial Security

about.title: About Tez Motors
